cases.description: Rayleigh range for a fundamental Gaussian (M2=1). w0=0.5mm, lambda=1.064um.
Rayleigh range for M2=2 (reduced by factor 2).
Far-field half-angle divergence for a fundamental Gaussian.
Gaussian radius at one Rayleigh range from the waist.
Gaussian radius at 3*zR from the waist.
Complex q parameter at z=100 mm from the waist — first half of the round‑trip.
cases.derivation: q(z) = z + i*zR. With z=100 mm and zR=738.156168794 mm (from case rayleigh-m2-1).

cases.description: Round‑trip: qAtZ then radiusFromQ recovers the Gaussian radius at that z.
cases.derivation: Using 1/q = 1/R - i*lambda_eff/(pi*w^2) gives w = sqrt(lambda_eff / (pi * (-Im(1/q)))). Equivalently w(z) = w0*sqrt(1+(z/zR)^2) = 0.5 * sqrt(1 + (100/738.156)^2) = 0.5 * sqrt(1.01835) = 0.504567 mm.

cases.description: ABCD transform of q by a thin lens (f=200 mm) with input waist 500 mm before the lens.
cases.triage: Manager 2026-07-04: Worker-Werte {'re': -218.901, 'im': 46.5071} waren auf 6 Stellen gerundet (im sogar falsch gerundet) bei Toleranz 1e-6; exakte Rechnung q'=q/(Cq+1) unabhaengig nachvollzogen, Core exakt.

cases.description: Extract new waist position and size after the thin lens using waistFromQ.
cases.derivation: waistOffsetMm = -Re(q) = 218.901 mm. rayleighRangeMm = Im(q) = 46.5071 mm. waistRadiusMm = sqrt( M2 * lambda_mm * zR' / pi ) = sqrt(0.001064 * 46.5071 / 3.14159265) = sqrt(0.015751) = 0.12551 mm.
cases.triage: Manager 2026-07-04: Worker-Wert 0.12551 hatte Letztstellen-Dreher; exakt ist sqrt(lambda*zR/pi) = 0.1255034 (unabhaengig nachgerechnet, Core exakt).

cases.description: Composite matrix of free-space (100 mm) and a plane-parallel slab (t=50 mm, n=1.5) yields effective B = L + t/n.
cases.derivation: A plane-parallel slab in air acts as free-space(t/n). Combined with free-space(L) the total B = L + t/n = 100 + 50/1.5 = 100 + 33.333... = 133.333... mm.
